assumptions: TypingAnimation component accepts speed prop in milliseconds
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 4 (single component, parameter change), Risk: 3 (UI timing only), Novelty: 3 (following existing pattern), Cross-domain: 3 (frontend only), Ambiguity: 1 (clear intent), Dependency: 2 (self-contained). Total: 16 - Simple

input_quality.reasoning: Input specifies exact timing values (current 60-100ms, expected 20-25ms) with clear acceptance criteria. Has Steps to Reproduce and Expected Result sections.
